MATCH (p:Program)-[:HAS_SEMESTER]->(s:Semester)-[:HAS_SUBJECT]->(sub:Subject)
WHERE sub.ten_hoc_phan CONTAINS "Anh văn CN"
RETURN s.number AS SemesterNumber, p.ten_chuong_trinh AS ProgramName
